name: Cambi ASA
summary: Cambi ASA provides thermal hydrolysis, advanced anaerobic digestion, and biogas solutions for sewage sludge and organic waste management in Europe, the United States, Asia, and Oceania. The company also engages in the wholesale recycling of organic resources from households and industry, such as sewage sludge, garden waste, digestate, and rock flour. In addition, it offers process live update and support, sample testing, front end engineering studies, engineering design, installation, commissioning, digester ramp-up, training solution, site, remote support, spare parts, optimization, and upgrades and expansions services. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Asker, Norway.
